name: accounting firms managing 5–15 clients tool
description: For accounting firms managing 5–15 clients, manual calculations cause delayed financial reporting. We automate depreciation schedules instead of manual calculations and spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate or delayed asset depreciation reporting
features: provide a user-friendly interface for manual adjustments
